description.p: You have trained your body and reflexes to weather any assault. You gain the following benefits:

Unyielding Constitution. If you are not incapacitated, you can use your Constitution saving throw in place of any Dexterity saving throw you make against a spell or other harmful effect that affects you.

Shield Interposition. If you are subjected to an effect that allows you to make a Dexterity saving throw to take only half damage, you can use your reaction to take no damage instead if you succeed on the saving throw, by placing your shield between you and the source of the effect. You must be wearing a shield to use this benefit.

sheet.description: Use Constitution saves instead of Dexterity saves against spells/effects. When you succeed on a Dexterity save that would deal half damage, you can use your reaction (shield required) to take no damage instead.
